title: Pattern File
description: Frontmatter of a pattern file in patterns/. Two flavors: source=auto_extracted (derived from observed structure, regenerated by ds-refresh) and source=manual (team-owned intent, never overwritten). The body is free-form markdown and is not modeled here.

name.description: Pattern identifier, kebab-case, matching the filename without extension (e.g. composition-rules, layout-rules, accessibility-rules, intent, brand-voice, index).

source.description: auto_extracted: fully derived from the cache; ds-refresh regenerates it; hand-edits are overwritten. manual: team-owned; ds-write only scaffolds it and never overwrites an existing one; ds-refresh never touches it.

last_updated.description: Date the file was last generated (auto_extracted) or scaffolded (manual).
